forecast.label: swap the sample deck for Mega Lucario ex, piloted by the heuristic
forecast.local_evidence: prior: the meta deck LOST to sample with the weak PIMC pilot; pilot now stronger but flat
forecast.proposition: the Mega Lucario ex deck piloted by the heuristic beats the heuristic+sample-deck baseline (648.1) on the ladder, by a margin the games can resolve

forecast.label: heuristic v5: attach energy toward the attacker nearest its attack cost
forecast.local_evidence: v4 = flat priorities {ATTACH:50,EVOLVE:48,…}; v5 adds energy-target shaping
forecast.proposition: heuristic v5 (energy-target attachment) beats heuristic v4 (648.1) on the ladder, by a margin the games can resolve

forecast.label: build a deeper ISMCTS (tree + rollouts) and pit it against the heuristic
forecast.local_evidence: dig + session: rule-based heuristics > search/RL/neural here; the pilot, not search depth, wins
forecast.proposition: a deeper ISMCTS (tree + rollouts) beats the heuristic v4 (648.1) on the ladder, by a margin the games can resolve

forecast.label: swap the sample deck for monofighting, piloted by the heuristic
forecast.local_evidence: real-cabt N=60-300: monofighting>sample 0.60 [0.51,0.68] deck-on-deck (greedy both); heuristic 0.76 [0.67,0.83] vs greedy on monofighting vs FLAT 0.46 on sample
forecast.proposition: the monofighting deck piloted by the heuristic beats the heuristic+sample-deck baseline (648.1) on the ladder, by a margin the games can resolve

forecast.label: rebuild Abomasnow: cut energy 35->13 + graft a draw/search engine, piloted by the heuristic
forecast.local_evidence: container (heuristic held constant, vs the real extracted Lucario decklist): board fix CONFIRMED (avg max bench 1.0->3.5); self-play win-rate indistinguishable (0.525 vs 0.588) but BLIND to the real field (old = 0.588 self-play / 0.33 ladder)
forecast.proposition: the rebuilt consistent Mega Abomasnow ex deck (13 energy / 34 trainer / 13 Pokemon) piloted by the heuristic beats the v4 starter-deck baseline (~712 ladder) by a margin the games can resolve

forecast.label: ship heuristic_v5 (6-term structural scorer) as the default pilot on v4's bot-friendly deck
forecast.local_evidence: v5 SEES the board (6 weighted terms) vs v4's type-only blindness; does-it-run verified (legal moves on v4's deck, container). But 0-for-2 on cabt bets; bot-friendly lesson warns complexity may hurt the simple deck; self-play is anti-signal
forecast.proposition: heuristic_v5 (the board-aware structural scorer) piloting v4's deck beats the v4 type-only heuristic baseline (~719 ladder) by a margin the games can resolve

forecast.label: swap to the converged top-tier Dwebble/Crustle deck, piloted by the v4 type-only heuristic
forecast.local_evidence: Echelon v0 (254 real top-tier matches): Dwebble/Crustle dominates (304 share, 0.81 vs Lucario, 0.78 vs Dragapult); the top list is CONVERGED (36 byte-identical winner copies); imitation spike: v4-class priors match Dwebble/Crustle experts 0.57 top-1 (held-out, 8-seed CV) = pilot already adequate; deck is bot-friendly-leaning (31E/8P/21T)
forecast.proposition: the converged Dwebble/Crustle deck piloted by the v4 type-only heuristic beats the v4 baseline (~719 ladder) by a margin the games can resolve
